Okay, and a summit, and you guys have probably seen, we did two summits last year, we'll probably do two more this year. We keep doing these summits because they are amazing ways to generate leads, okay? The summit becomes the lead magnet, okay? You guys want to know what a summit is? We're interviewing a whole bunch of speakers on a certain topic, okay? So the summit is the actual lead magnet. Give me your email address. I'm going to give you access, excuse me, to this entire summit with a whole bunch of people who are going to help you on whatever the topic is, okay? So the summit becomes the lead magnet, okay? So this is what a basic summit funnel looks like, okay? Page number one, there's a video or something talking about, here's what the summit is, register to get access to it, and down below you see like, here's all the speakers that are going to be speaking in the summit, okay? So that's page number one, and here's an example of our Philly Bootcamp. Well, I guess I've gone through our Philly Bootcamp. It's an example of a summit funnel, right? There's a video of me here on top basically saying, I'm going to teach you guys how to get in 100 days to turn your hobby as an affiliate to a full-time career, like going through this Philly Bootcamp. They watch the video, and that's step number one, okay? Now the one thing about a summit funnel is that really quickly it pushes you up here to start selling. So it's the only one of our lead funnels you start selling at immediately, okay? So right here is there's an upsell. Now everyone does summits in different ways. Typically when someone's selling a summit, their upsell right here is going to be like an all-access pass. It's like, hey, you're going to get the summit, but it's going to expire every day. The summit's live for a day, then you lose that lead mag, disappears. If you pay for an all-access pass for 100 bucks or whatever, then we're going to give you guys all the interviews, and they're there forever. You can listen to them whenever you want. Plus, we're going to give you the transcripts and this and a whole bunch of other things to increase the value of the offer, right? And so this is where a lot of people do that, is that they have the upsell right here. And the upsell will typically cover all the ad costs that you have, that you're driving ads into the summit funnel, okay? So you're getting leads for free because that upsell there covers your ad costs. Now for me, I did it a little differently because my biggest goal was to get people into one funnel-way challenge, which I'll talk about after the break when we come back talking about challenge funnels. But for me, challenge is one of the most powerful tools we have right here at the unboxing level. So I go from the lead mag, then getting the summit immediately to here. I think I'm one of the only people I've ever seen do that. Most people go directly from here and sell all-access pass or some kind of offer related to the summit, okay? All right, so that's page number two for me is again. And I kind of do the same thing, they get the all-access pass for free when they join the one funnel-way challenge, okay? And then down here, what happens then is that after they opt in, each day, they will get a page like this, it's like, okay, here's the first five speakers. And have until you get 24 hours to go listen to it, right? So it's lead magnet that kind of disappears. So they have 24 hours to go listen to interview one, interview two, interview three, interview four, interview five, okay? And then after 24 hours, it disappears. Then the next day comes out, okay? Here's the next five interviews. And they listen to those, and then those disappear after 24 hours. The next one comes out again, they're live for 24 hours and they disappear. The reason I make it disappear is because the upsell gets the all-access pass. And so by making them disappear and taking them offline, there's more reasons why people want to go and buy the all-access pass. They may have missed one of the interviews or maybe they missed day two because they were traveling or maybe they couldn't consume it all because it's like 40 hours of interviews and like I want to watch it later. Then the all-access pass, the value of that dramatically increases and becomes more valuable, okay? And so throughout the entire challenge, I keep selling that all-access pass. Excuse me, throughout this entire summit, I keep selling all-access pass. You can access that as well, okay? The biggest thing to understand is that the summit funnel, it's a lead magnet. The summit is the lead magnet. You give me an email address, I'm going to give you access to this amazing summit. And there's a bunch of really fun, cool, unique ways to monetize it on the back end, okay? All right, so again, this is our summit funnel right here. This is what the pages look like. They opted in, boom, we sold them on our challenge, gave all-access pass, and then there's the lead magnet, the interviews each day. We do it over three days, we give access to all the different interviews, and then we pull them off, okay? We do the same thing with our 30-day challenge, same kind of concept, right? So we came in here, there's a video of me explaining, like, hey, give me an email address, and we can access this challenge, where I interview a whole bunch of people about it. They were to lose everything, I had no money left. What would you do over the next 30 days to get back on top? Okay, that's the lead magnet. They give me the email address, and then boom, here I have to sell them on one-for-one-way challenge, and they get all-access pass as well. And then boom, day one, day two, day three, they get the videos, and they get pulled away. Okay, now typically the way that most people do it, the first time you do a summit, usually it's live, live, right? So it's like, the lead magnet you're driving traffic to is like, hey, next week or next month we're doing this summit, it's going to be amazing. Get, you know, put your email address now so you can sign up for the summit that's coming in the future. So people spend a couple months doing all the, or a couple of weeks building it up, getting a big list of people, and then the summit launches live, and that's how we do ours the first time, and then afterwards we set it evergreen. So you can make it evergreen for like, right now if you go to 30days.com, you can see it's Funnel It's Live. If you go to philipbookamp.com, you can see that funnel, it's live. Okay, there was a time when we launched them live, but now that they're done and they're in there, they're evergreen, and that's kind of how the funnels work now. And both these funnels generate tons of leads for us all the time. 24 hours a day we're driving traffic into both 30days.com and philipbookamp.com, and they're great lead generators for us as well. Okay, so there you guys have it. Those are the three core lead funnels that we use to grow all of our companies.
